exercises.title: Multi-Protocol Simulator
exercises.description: Build a simulator supporting multiple P&M protocols with a unified interface.
tasks: Create BB84, B92, and Six-State implementations
Add configurable noise and loss parameters
hints: Use strategy pattern for protocol swapping
Common interface: prepare, measure, sift, calculate_qber
Each protocol defines its state space
Track sifting efficiency, QBER, key rate

exercises.title: State Space Visualizer
exercises.description: Create Bloch sphere visualizations for protocol states.
hints: States are points on unit sphere

exercises.title: Sifting Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze sifting phase efficiency and information leakage.
tasks: Calculate theoretical vs actual sifting efficiency
Analyze what Eve learns from basis announcements
hints: Basis info alone reveals nothing about bits

exercises.title: Key Rate Optimizer
exercises.description: Optimize secret key rate for given channel conditions.
tasks: Model channel loss and detector characteristics
Find optimal protocol for given conditions
Plot key rate vs distance for each protocol
exercises.expectedOutput: Key rate optimization and comparison tool
hints: Consider: repetition rate, transmission, detector efficiency
Secret rate = sifted rate × secret fraction
Different protocols optimal at different distances
